{{Relic Infobox|Yummy Cookie|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Upgrade|2}}
{{R|Yummy Cookie||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Choosing this relic allows you to upgrade up to 4 of your cards.

== Sources ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Yummy Cookie''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Nutritious Soup||2}} and {{R|Very Hot Cocoa||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.
